results.claim: SCL MatMul = W·x + b for ALL W, b, x (exact, Real arithmetic)
SCL Add = a + b for ALL a, b (exact, element-wise)
|LUT_interp(x) - f(x)| <= M2*h^2/8 for ANY f with |f''|<=M2
results.details: Z3 UNSAT: bound holds for all cubic polynomials with bounded 2nd derivative

results.claim: SCL SiLU = PyTorch SiLU (identical analytic formula)
results.details: Transcendental exp(x) — Z3 NRA incomplete; analytic identity suffices (same formula in SCL and PyTorch)

results.claim: SCL Softmax = PyTorch Softmax (identical analytic formula)
results.details: Transcendental exp(x) — Z3 NRA cannot handle; analytic identity suffices (same formula in SCL and PyTorch). Key property: argmax(softmax(x)) = argmax(x) by monotonicity of exp.

results.claim: SCL Argmax = argmax_i x_i for ALL x (exact)
